name: @ehrbase-ui/config-tailwind
description: Shared Tailwind v4 CSS preset for the ehrbase-ui monorepo. Owns the @theme tokens, dark-mode variant, root + dark color scales, base-layer accessibility rules (focus-visible + scroll-margin-top per WCAG 2.4.7 + 2.4.11), and the skip-link styling. Apps import this preset on top of their own `@import 'tailwindcss'` entry line.
